'''D.T. Spool and the Skroaches''' were a rebellious [[Band/Legends|band]] popular among the youths of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in the period leading up to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
